JACKPOT COW CASINO FAQ

Registering at Jackpot Cow Casino is a rapid and straightforward process that will only take you a couple of minutes. Click the SIGN IN button on the top right corner of the site to open the registration form.

Click on REGISTER, and fill in the required fields such as email address, country, name, etc. Choose a strong password, and don’t forget to confirm you want to receive Free Spins and Bonuses! This way, you won’t miss out on the most generous promotions in the industry.

If you are registering from a mobile device, click on SIGN IN, enter your email address and you will receive an email with a login code. Input this code, add your phone number, and click NEXT. You will then receive an SMS with another code. Enter this code and complete the registration by filling in the required fields with your personal details.

We are not talking about one welcome offer here, but more like four welcome offers! You will get bonuses with your first four €20+ deposits at Jackpot Cow.

Just to give you an idea: you will receive a 100% up to €500 bonus with your first deposit. Sounds good, right?

Keep on depositing and keep on milking the bonuses cow! You can find more information here.

Experience even more excitement with Epic Drop Jackpots – thrilling jackpot pools primed to burst with massive cash prizes at any moment!

Every bet is a new chance to boost your bankroll with EPIC rewards from Epic Drop Jackpots! Enjoy the Mini Jackpot, Super Jackpot, and the Epic Jackpot, constantly growing in value and dropping multiple times a day.

The more players that join, the bigger the prizes are, and the more frequently prizes drop! All jackpot winnings are real cash with no wagering requirements.

Of course! After all, we are called Jackpot Cow Casino, right? We have new and fresh different jackpots running all the time.

Keep an eye on our exciting deposit raffle jackpots and other themed jackpots under the Promotions page. Don’t miss out on all these extra wins and free cash!

Our recommended exclusive Instant Bank integration - with all leading banks for the easiest deposits and fastest withdrawals - means that you will only experience seamless transactions.

You will be happy to hear that players typically receive their winnings within one working day (please be aware that there may be slight delays during weekends and bank holidays).

Please note that Instant Bank Transfer is available only in selected regions. Double-check with our professional support team if you have any questions.

At Jackpot Cow Casino, we know how crucial fast and easy deposits and withdrawals are for your gaming experience.

Experience flawless transactions with us! We offer a worry-free process with a wide range of options. Choose the method that suits you best, and deposit now!

Jackpot Cow offers multiple options, including Instant Bank Transfer, Visa, Mastercard, e-wallets, and pre-paid options.

All deposits are instant, and withdrawals are typically processed within 48 hours, which is often faster for verified players. You can find more info here.

At Jackpot Cow, we believe in rewarding our players in ways that are as dynamic as our platform.

Our promotions and bonuses are designed to keep the excitement levels high and the rewards flowing like fresh milk. From amazing welcome bonuses to deposit matches, plus daily and weekly promotions that defy expectations, we ensure there’s always something to keep you coming back for more. Free Spins, too, of course!

Loyal players are recognised and rewarded for choosing us with exclusive perks and benefits that truly set us apart from the herd.

While we enjoy shaking things up, we’re also serious about security and fairness. Jackpot Cow Casino is fully licensed and regulated by the Estonian Tax and Customs Board in Estonia and operated by Frenwall Limited, a company registered in Cyprus.

Our casino is founded on a bedrock of trust with cutting-edge security measures to protect your personal and financial information.

You can find the complete license information and our registered address in the footer of any of our website’s pages.

Live chat at Jackpot Cow Casino

Hit the chat widget to open Live Chat and speak to trained agents. Need help with payments or bonuses? We are just a moment away. If live chat is unavailable, Jackpot Cow Casino replies to emails within 24 hours.
